title: Cleaning Brush,Hard Bristle Crevice Cleaning Brush UK 3 Pcs Bathroom Crevice Gaps Brush Groove Crevice Cleaning Tool for Narrow Corners in Home Kitchen Bathroom and Window
features: Premium Material: The crevice cleaning brush is made of fine and hard PP bristles, bristle thickness and width,easier to enter small crevices, cleaning small crevices is no longer difficult.

High-Efficient Crevice Cleaning Tool: Flat brush head design can conveniently reaching deep into crevices or grooves,easily reach to the dead corners, making it easier to clean small spaces dust, debris, and other dirt in hard-to-reach areas.

Easy To Use: Our Crevice Cleaning Brush is designed with an easy-to-grip handle, providing a comfortable hold for effortless cleaning. The front end of the crevice cleaning brush is beveled at 15°, which can better contact and clean the crevices. allowing you to access hard-to-reach spots and narrow corners with ease.

Wide Application: CUCM cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning various gaps and corners, such as window tracks, tile countertop grout lines, corners, lint from fans, stove, fridge gaskets, furniture, bathroom tub, sliding door tracks, windowsills, closet tracks, sink handles, shower stand, tight spaces, between the sink and the backsplash, etc

Easy To Wash&Store: Simply rinse the gap brush under running water or give it a quick wipe to remove any residue. The handle of the brush is also designed with a small hole for easy hanging up to save space and drying.
description: Product Description A Professional Gap Cleaning Brush The curved brush head design is suitable for different surface shapes and cleans all areas thoroughly. Suitable For Different Scenarios CUCM cleaning brush is suitable for cleaning various gaps and corners, such as window tracks, tile countertop grout lines, corners, lint from fans, stove, fridge gaskets, furniture, bathroom tub, sliding door tracks, windowsills, closet tracks, sink handles, shower stand, tight spaces, between the sink and the backsplash, etc Easy To Clean The dense arrangement of the bristles effectively prevents dirt residue and makes cleaning easier. Stainless Steel Material Thanks to the use of stainless steel materials, the bristles are firmly and stably attached. They will not fall off, deform or rust. Comfortable Touch Ergonomic design of the handle for comfortable touch, fatigue-free use and easy storage thanks to the hanging loop.
